name: Stadium Golf Center & Batting Cages
address: 2990 Murphy Canyon Rd, San Diego, CA 92123
about: Stadium Golf Center & Batting Cages is a comprehensive golf and sports facility in San Diego operating since 1995. It features a driving range, short game area, award-winning golf shop, custom club fitting with a FlightScope Launch Monitor, and a full-service golf academy offering private lessons and monthly group memberships. The venue utilizes Total Range by Foresight Sports for its golf simulator bays, providing access to a vast library of world-class courses. It also includes batting cages, making it a multi-sport destination for both golfers and baseball players.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses high-end Total Range by Foresight Sports simulators for a realistic course experience
Features professional club fitting with advanced FlightScope Launch Monitor technology
Offers unlimited monthly group lessons and flexible private coaching options
Provides a full-service golf shop with major brands and a 90-day satisfaction guarantee

food_and_drink.notes: No information provided about food service
No information provided about alcohol service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the facility provides practice balls and has rental options available. They also offer custom club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about outside food and drink policies on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information about the duration for a full 18-hole round is provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Stadium Golf Center offers junior golf academy programs, PGA Junior League, and caters to families with youth-oriented services.
